_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology
_publications._fundingAgency: NTAP; NCI; Department of Defense CDMRP
_publications._context: WU-561 assembled into 3D microtissues from primary left pelvis NF1-MPNST; microtissue quality not determined (ND) at 48 h post-encapsulation

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated MPNST cell line established at Washington University from a primary left pelvis NF1-MPNST; development publication unknown, earliest known reference is PMID:37246765
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Division of Oncology, Washington University School of Medicine
